name: op-django
description: Opinionated, fully type-safe Django. The hard-to-type parts of Django — ORM querysets, model instances, related managers — are encapsulated behind repositories that return Pydantic DTOs. Services contain your business logic with zero ORM imports. Views are thin one-liners. Everything is typed end-to-end, testable in isolation, and wired together with uv, svcs, django-ninja, and Celery reliable signals.
